body:
## Rationale

Mastodon's debut full-length on Relapse Records. Brann Dailor's first full LP recording. Remission (2002) is the origin point of the entire Mastodon discography — completely distinct from the later Reprise-era sound: raw Southern sludge metal with Brann's jazz-influenced drumming but fewer progressive polyrhythm elements than Crack the Skye or Leviathan.

**Current Mastodon/Brann arc on MetalForge:**
- crack-the-skye ✅ in DB
- leviathan — in ai-fix #1853
- blood-mountain — in ai-fix #2159
- ❌ **remission** — MISSING (debut, origin point of arc)

Remission is not in `albumArticles.js` and not in any open proposal. Opening the arc at the debut gives MetalForge the full Mastodon editorial coverage from origin to peak.

**GSC context:** Brann Dailor has active GSC signal (22 impr/0% CTR baselining per CEO log). 'mastodon first album drums', 'brann dailor debut recording' are unmet search queries.

## Files to create

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add remission-drum-setup entry
- `public/llms/articles/remission-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion

## Data shape

```js
{
  slug: 'remission-drum-setup',
  title: "Brann Dailor's Drum Setup on Mastodon's Remission (2002)",
  drummer: 'Brann Dailor',
  drummerId: 'brann-dailor',
  band: 'Mastodon',
  year: 2002,
  album: 'Remission',
  label: 'Relapse Records',
  description: 'Brann Dailor recorded Remission — Mastodon\'s debut — on a DW kit before the band\'s Tama endorsement era. The album is characterized by a raw, unprocessed drum sound with heavy jazz-influenced tom patterns underneath the sludge riffing.',
  gear: {
    drums: ['DW Collector\'s Series (pre-Tama endorsement), 22"/10"/12"/14"/16"'],
    snare: ['DW 14x6.5 Black Nickel over Steel'],
    cymbals: ['Zildjian A series (early career)'],
    pedals: ['Pearl Eliminator double pedal (early period)'],
    sticks: ['Vic Firth 5A']
  },
  faq: [
    { q: 'What kit did Brann Dailor use on Remission?', a: 'A DW Collector\'s Series kit, before Mastodon\'s later Tama endorsement.' },
    { q: 'Is Remission Mastodon\'s first album?', a: 'Yes — Remission (2002) is Mastodon\'s debut full-length, released on Relapse Records.' },
    { q: 'How does Brann Dailor\'s drumming on Remission differ from later albums?', a: 'Remission has a rawer, less polished production with more straightforward sludge patterns compared to the complex polyrhythms of Crack the Skye or Blood Mountain.' }
  ],
  relatedAlbums: ['crack-the-skye-drum-setup']
}
```

## Quality gate
- [ ] ≥300 words
- [ ] ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
- [ ] ≥3 internal links
- [ ] Person + MusicAlbum JSON-LD
- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets 'mastodon debut drums', 'brann dailor 2002 kit', 'mastodon remission drum setup', 'mastodon relapse records drums'. Opens the Brann Dailor arc at origin; complements the leviathan and blood-mountain articles pending in ai-fix.

## Verify
1. `/articles/remission-drum-setup` loads with title, gear table, FAQ
2. FAQPage JSON-LD present in HTML source
3. `/llms/articles/remission-drum-setup.md` returns 200
4. Internal links to brann-dailor profile and crack-the-skye article work
5. URL in sitemap

## Done
- [ ] albumArticles.js entry added (slug: remission-drum-setup)
- [ ] LLM companion file created
- [ ] Article renders at /articles/remission-drum-setup
title: SEO: Mastodon 'Remission' drum setup (Brann Dailor, 2002 — debut album, Relapse Records sludge era)
